steps.title: Introduce both scientist and field
steps.content: The goal is to introduce Nadia Isabel Cruz and her field of study to a new audience. The sentence should name Cruz, identify her as a marine biologist, and explain coral reefs as the field she studies.

steps.title: Reject incomplete introductions
steps.content:
• Choice A introduces the Amazon Reef but not Cruz.
  • Choice C explains coral reefs but does not name the scientist.
  • Choice D names Cruz but does not identify her as a marine biologist or clearly state her field of study.
The remaining choice introduces Cruz and coral reefs together. The answer is B.
